description_onboarding: Answer based on your experience over the past week. There are no right or wrong answers.
description_weekly: How has your speech been this past week? Your answers help track your progress over time.

onboarding_gate.title: One quick step before we begin
onboarding_gate.description: These 10 questions help us personalize your exercises and track your progress from day one. Takes about 3 minutes.

questions.q1: How severe was your stuttering over the last week?
questions.q2: How often did you change, substitute or avoid words during the last week when you anticipated you might stutter?
questions.q3: To what extent did you feel physical tension while you were speaking last week?
questions.q4: How much energy did you expend last week focusing on how you were speaking rather than focusing on what you wanted to say?
questions.q5: During the past week how often did you avoid or wanted to avoid a conversation because of fear of stuttering?
questions.q6: How would you rate your level of anxiety while speaking?
questions.q7: How would you score your speech overall last week?
questions.q8: How would you rate the impact of stuttering in your school/work?
questions.q9: How would you rate the impact of stuttering in your social life?
questions.q10: How would you rate the global impact of stuttering in your quality of life?

progress.title: CBSA Assessments
progress.no_assessments_description: Assessments will appear here once the patient completes their first check-in.

patient_progress.page_subtitle: How your speaking has felt over time

card.title: Your check-ins
card.improving: Down {{points}} points since your last check-in. Keep going.
card.steady: Holding steady since your last check-in.
card.harder: This week felt a bit harder, and that is part of the journey.

patient_progress.headline_first: Here is your first check-in. Come back each week to see how things change.
patient_progress.headline_improving: You are trending down, {{points}} points lower than your last check-in. Nice work.
patient_progress.headline_steady: You are holding steady since your last check-in.
patient_progress.headline_harder: This week felt a bit harder than last. That happens, and it is part of the journey.
patient_progress.trend_title: How speaking has felt over time
patient_progress.lower_is_better: Lower is calmer. A line that drifts down means things are getting easier.
patient_progress.dimensions_subtitle: Latest check-in, with the change since the one before.
patient_progress.dimensions_subtitle_first: Your latest check-in. Next week you will see what changed.
patient_progress.error_title: We could not load your check-ins
patient_progress.error_description: Please try again in a moment.
patient_progress.empty_description: Once you complete a weekly check-in, your progress will show up here.

submit_error: Failed to submit assessment. Please try again.
